sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Activity, Percent, Eye, Hash } from 'lucide-react'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar } from 'recharts'; import './AnalysisResults.css'; const AnalysisResults = ({ result }) => { if (!result) return null; const { prediction, confidence, semantic_analysis, embedding_stats, comment } = result; const isBiased = prediction === 'biased' || prediction === 1; // Prepare semantic similarity data for visualization const semanticData = semantic_analysis?.similar_comments?.slice(0, 5).map((item, idx) => ({ name: `Example ${idx + 1}`, similarity: (item.similarity * 100).toFixed(1), label: item.label === 'biased' || item.label === 1 ? 'Biased' : 'Fair' })) || []; // Prepare embedding stats for radar chart const embeddingRadarData = embedding_stats ? [ { metric: 'Mean', value: Math.abs(embedding_stats.mean * 100) }, { metric: 'Std Dev', value: embedding_stats.std * 100 }, { metric: 'Min', value: Math.abs(embedding_stats.min * 100) }, { metric: 'Max', value: embedding_stats.max * 100 }, { metric: 'Norm', value: (embedding_stats.norm / 10) * 100 } ] : []; // Prepare confidence breakdown const confidenceData = [ { name: 'Confidence', value: (confidence * 100).toFixed(1), fill: '#667eea' }, { name: 'Uncertainty', value: ((1 - confidence) * 100).toFixed(1), fill: '#e2e8f0' } ]; return (
{/* Main Prediction Card */}
{isBiased ? ( <>

Biased Content Detected

This comment may contain bias or unfairness

) : ( <>

Fair Content

This comment appears to be fair and unbiased

)}
Confidence Level
{(confidence * 100).toFixed(2)}%

Analyzed Comment:

"{comment}"

{/* Visualizations Grid */}
{/* Confidence Breakdown */}

Model Confidence

`${value}%`} />
{/* Semantic Similarity */} {semanticData.length > 0 && (

Similar Training Examples

`${value}%`} /> `${val}%` }} />
{semantic_analysis.similar_comments.slice(0, 3).map((item, idx) => (
{item.label === 'biased' || item.label === 1 ? 'Biased' : 'Fair'} {(item.similarity * 100).toFixed(1)}% similar

"{item.comment}"

))}
)} {/* Embedding Statistics Radar */} {embeddingRadarData.length > 0 && (

Embedding Vector Analysis

value.toFixed(2)} />
Dimension: {embedding_stats.dimension}
L2 Norm: {embedding_stats.norm.toFixed(4)}
Mean: {embedding_stats.mean.toFixed(4)}
Std Dev: {embedding_stats.std.toFixed(4)}
)}
{/* Semantic Analysis Details */} {semantic_analysis && (

Semantic Analysis Details

Average Similarity: {(semantic_analysis.avg_similarity * 100).toFixed(2)}%
Most Similar Match: {(semantic_analysis.similar_comments[0]?.similarity * 100).toFixed(2)}%
Analysis Method: Sentence-BERT (all-MiniLM-L6-v2)
)}
); }; export default AnalysisResults;
